data.content: 1. Acceptance criteria verified in browser on 2026-03-31 at http://localhost:3001/beats: switching repo from foolery to knots changed the URL and repo label immediately, removed the stale row 'Wire lease agent metadata into knot step records', showed the 'Loading beats...' placeholder during the delayed fetch, and removed the placeholder only after the knots result rendered. 2. Static gates in /Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-f3eb passed: bun run lint (one existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. 3. Review rejected for regression/code drift against main: this branch deletes or removes the terminal light theme feature already merged on main, including src/hooks/use-terminal-theme-preference.ts, src/lib/terminal-theme.ts, Light Theme controls in src/components/settings-defaults-section.tsx and src/components/terminal-toolbar.tsx, and terminalLightTheme persistence wiring in src/lib/settings.ts. Rebase or cherry-pick the repo-switch work onto current main and keep those shipped terminal theme changes intact.
